title: Use Enum.map instead of explicit recursion for a doubled/1 transform
prompt: Given the module MyApp.Accumulators from test_fixtures/enum_reduce_awkward.ex, rewrite `doubled/1` to use `Enum.map/2` instead of explicit recursion. Output a single-function module `defmodule MyApp.Accumulators do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Obvious Enum.map replacement for a map-shaped transform. Single step.
